general_inquiry.question: Find the laplacian of the function $f(x,y,z)$ where $f(x,y,z) = \log \left(\frac{x-y^5}{z}\right)$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response:
The Laplacian of the function \( f(x,y,z) = \log \left(\frac{x-y^5}{z}\right) \) is:

\[ \nabla^2 f(x,y,z) = -\frac{y^3 \left(11y^5 - 60x \right)}{(x - y^5)^2} \]
